member.name: T:QuestGiver.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: API Controller for handling user-related operations, such as registration, authentication, profile management, and other user-specific functionalities.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(QuestGiver.Services.Users.IAuthService)
member.summary: Constructor for UsersController, which handles DI.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Controllers.AuthController.Create(QuestGiver.Models.Receive.CreateUserDTO)
member.summary: Hnadles the registration of a new user, along with creating a valid JWT token for the user to use for authentication in future requests.
member.returns: An AuthResponse with the UserDTO and JWT.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Common.IRepository
member.summary: Abstraction of repository access methods

member.summary: All records in a table

member.summary: All records in a table

member.summary: The result collection won't be tracked by the context

member.summary: The result collection won't be tracked by the context

member.summary: Entity framework DB context holding connection information and properties and tracking entity states

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Models.FriendGroup
member.summary: Represents a group of friends.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Models.Token
member.summary: Defines a token class that represents an authentication token for a user.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Models.User
member.summary: The User class - represents a user in the system.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Models.UserFriendGroup
member.summary: A helper class to represent the many-to-many relationship between Users and FriendGroups.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Data.Models.UserSettings
member.summary: Represents a set of configurable settings for a user.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Models.Common.AutoMapper
member.summary: AutoMapper profile for mapping between data models and view models in the QuestGiver application.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Models.Common.AutoMapper.#ctor
member.summary: Creates maps.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Models.Send.AuthResponse
member.summary: Join DTO for users and tokens during auth.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Users.AuthService.#ctor(QuestGiver.Data.Common.IRepository,AutoMapper.IMapper,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.IPasswordHasher{System.String},QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.ITokensService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AuthService class using the specified repository.
member.param: The repository used for data access operations required by the authentication service. Cannot be null.
Password hasher used to securely store passwords.
The token service used for handling JWT.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Services.Users.IAuthService
member.summary: Handles user-related business logic, such as registration, authentication, profile management, and other user-specific functionalities. This service is responsible for implementing the core logic for user operations and is used by the AuthController to process incoming requests related to users.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Users.IAuthService.CreateUserAsync(QuestGiver.Models.Receive.CreateUserDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new user by processing the model, hashing password, and saving the user to the database. Also, orchestrates token generation.
member.returns: A user dto ready to be sent to the frontend along with the token.

member.name: T:QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.ITokensService
member.summary: Handles the business logic related to token generation, validation, and management. This service is responsible for implementing the core logic for handling tokens, such as creating JWTs, validating them, and managing token lifecycles. It is used by the AuthService to generate tokens during user authentication and other token-related operations.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.ITokensService.GenerateAccessToken(System.Guid)
member.summary: Generates a JWT token for the specified user. This method creates a token that can be used for authenticating the user in subsequent requests.
member.param: The user for whom the token is being generated.
member.returns: A JWT token as a string.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.ITokensService.GenerateRefreshToken
member.summary: Generates a new refresh token for use in authentication workflows.
member.returns: A string containing the newly generated refresh token. The token is suitable for securely identifying a user session during token refresh operations.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.ITokensService.CreateTokenAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates and saves a token entity.
member.param: The user id to be linked with the token.

member.name: M:QuestGiver.Services.Tokens.TokensService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,QuestGiver.Data.Common.IRepository,AutoMapper.IMapper)
member.summary: DI constructor for TokensService, which takes in the application configuration to access JWT settings such as the secret key, issuer, audience, and token expiration times. This allows the service to generate and manage tokens based on the configured parameters.
